Home / Honeymoon / Shimla Manali 4N 5D Honeymoon Package From Delhi By Cab

Shimla Manali Honeymoon Travel Package 4 Nights 5 Days From Dehli By Cab

Experience the magic of the hills with our Shimla Manali 4 Nights 5 Days Honeymoon Package from Delhi by cab. This romantic getaway is perfect for newlyweds seeking peace, breathtaking mountain views, and cozy moments together.

Enjoy a scenic drive from Delhi to Shimla, explore the Mall Road, Jakhoo Temple, and Kufri’s snowy charm. Continue to Manali for an unforgettable honeymoon amid serene valleys and adventure spots like Solang Valley and Rohtang Pass. Our all‑inclusive honeymoon package offers comfortable stays, private cab transfers, and memorable experiences, making your Shimla Manali trip from Delhi relaxing, romantic, and hassle‑free.

INR 35,990 Onwards
INR 45,990

Transfers Included
Stay Included
Meal Included
Sightseeing Included
Trip Duration
4 Nights | 5 Days

Delhi Shimla Manali Delhi

Luxury

Trip Hightlights

Mall Road Shimla

Mall Road in Shimla is the heart of the city's shopping, dining, and sightseeing experience. Lined with colonial-era buildings, vibrant shops, and cozy cafes, it offers a perfect blend of history and modernity. Visitors can enjoy leisurely walks, shop for Himachali handicrafts, and savor delicious local and international cuisines. With popular attractions like Scandal Point, Kali Bari Temple, and Gaiety Theatre nearby, Mall Road is a must-visit destination for tourists seeking the true charm of Shimla.

Mall Road Shimla

Mall Road in Shimla is the heart of the city's shopping, dining, and sightseeing experience. Lined with colonial-era buildings, vibrant shops, and cozy cafes, it offers a perfect blend of history and modernity. Visitors can enjoy leisurely walks, shop for Himachali handicrafts, and savor delicious local and international cuisines. With popular attractions like Scandal Point, Kali Bari Temple, and Gaiety Theatre nearby, Mall Road is a must-visit destination for tourists seeking the true charm of Shimla.

Mall Road Shimla

Mall Road in Shimla is the heart of the city's shopping, dining, and sightseeing experience. Lined with colonial-era buildings, vibrant shops, and cozy cafes, it offers a perfect blend of history and modernity. Visitors can enjoy leisurely walks, shop for Himachali handicrafts, and savor delicious local and international cuisines. With popular attractions like Scandal Point, Kali Bari Temple, and Gaiety Theatre nearby, Mall Road is a must-visit destination for tourists seeking the true charm of Shimla.


Tour Itinerary

Our Shimla Manali Honeymoon Travel Package offers a beautifully planned 4 nights and 5 days itinerary designed for couples who want to explore nature, romance, and adventure. The journey begins from Delhi with a comfortable cab transfer to Shimla, where you can enjoy the charming Mall Road, Kufri, and colonial landmarks. Next, experience the breathtaking beauty of Manali with visits to Solang Valley, Rohtang Pass, and Hadimba Temple.

This honeymoon tour ensures romantic stays, scenic drives, and picture-perfect moments throughout your trip. Make your Shimla Manali honeymoon truly unforgettable with this hassle-free travel package from Delhi.

4N | 5D
2 Nights In
SHIMLA
2 Nights In
MANALI

2 Nights In
SHIMLA
Day 1
Delhi To Shimla Day Journey By Cab

Start your romantic journey with a comfortable cab ride from Delhi to Shimla, covering approximately 350 km in about 7–8 hours. Enjoy scenic views of the Himalayan foothills and peaceful countryside as you travel towards Shimla, the Queen of Hills. Arrive in Shimla by evening and check into your cozy hotel for a relaxing overnight stay. Savor a delicious dinner amidst the cool mountain air, making your first day of the Shimla Manali honeymoon travel package truly memorable and hassle-free.

Shimla - Manali Tour package by AC Volvo

INR 10,999 Onwards

What’s inside the package?

Inclusions
  • 24×7 Support
  • All accommodation including tea, Breakfast & Dinner
  • Transport for Local sightseeing and Transfer from Starting point to the endpoint
  • Welcome drink on each hotel at the time of check-in
  • Free Wi-Fi in all hotels (If available)
  • All taxes (Except GST)
Exclusions
  • Travel insurance, medical insurance and other emergencies
  • Flights Ticket & Airport Transfers
  • Anything not mentioned under “Package Inclusions“
  • All Personal Expenses
